title: Update ui/pages/backtest.py

modifications: Added Run Backtest section with symbol dropdown, stop loss %, take profit %, and initial capital inputs
Added Run Backtest button that triggers backtest execution
Added 4 performance metric cards: Win Rate, Total Return, Max Drawdown, Total Trades
Added Equity Curve chart using dcc.Graph with plotly
Added Recent Trades table showing last 20 trades with symbol, direction, entry/exit prices, P&L %, result
Implemented run_backtest_callback() to execute backtest via backtest.runner.run_backtest()
Integrated with backtest history selector to view historical results

git_commit: T-072: Update backtest page with run button, chart, and trade table
notes: Complete UI overhaul for backtest page with T-072 requirements: configurable parameters, real-time execution, performance cards, equity chart, and trade table
